APIKey.description: TrakRF API key (JWT). Format: "Bearer <jwt>". Mint keys from the API Keys section of your TrakRF account.
APIKey.name: Authorization

BearerAuth.description: Session JWT for internal endpoints (platform frontend uses this).

info.description: TrakRF public REST API. See docs.trakrf.id/api for the customer-facing reference.
info.title: TrakRF API

get.description: Paginated assets list with natural-key filters, sort, and substring search

parameters.description: filter by location natural key (may repeat)
parameters.name: location

parameters.description: substring search (case-insensitive) on name, identifier, description, and active identifier values
parameters.name: q

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

post.description:
Create a new asset record, optionally with one or more tag identifiers (RFID, BLE, barcode).
Returns the created asset with its assigned identifiers. The Location response header contains the canonical URL.

requestBody.description: Asset to create with optional identifiers

delete.description: Delete an asset by its natural identifier. The asset is removed from all subsequent queries and its identifier becomes immediately available for reuse. Returns 204 on success, 404 if the asset does not exist or has already been deleted.

get.description: Retrieve an asset by its natural identifier. Returns 404 if the asset does not exist.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

put.description: Update mutable fields on an existing asset. Only fields included in the request body are changed.

get.description: Location history for an asset identified by its natural key.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

post.description:
Attach a tag identifier (RFID EPC, BLE beacon ID, barcode, etc.) to an existing asset.
The identifier must be unique within the organization.
post.summary: Add an identifier to an asset

delete.description: Detach a tag identifier from an asset by its identifier record ID.
delete.summary: Remove an identifier from an asset

post.description: Persist scanned RFID assets to the asset_scans hypertable

requestBody.description: Save request with location and asset IDs

403.description: Location or assets not owned by org

parameters.description: substring search (case-insensitive) on name, identifier, description, and active identifier values
parameters.name: q

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

post.description:
Create a new location in the hierarchy, optionally with one or more tag identifiers.
Set ParentLocationID to nest the location under an existing parent. The Location response header contains the canonical URL.

requestBody.description: Location to create with optional identifiers

get.description: Snapshot of each asset's most recent location, filterable by natural key.

parameters.description: substring search (case-insensitive) on asset name, identifier, and active identifier values
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: comma-separated sort fields; prefix '-' for DESC
parameters.name: sort

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

delete.description: Delete a location by its natural identifier. The location is removed from all subsequent queries and its identifier becomes immediately available for reuse. Returns 204 on success, 404 if the location does not exist or has already been deleted.

get.description: Retrieve a location by its natural identifier. Returns 404 if the location does not exist.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Steady-state requests/min for this API key

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining before throttling; bounded by X-RateLimit-Limit

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when X-RateLimit-Remaining will next equal X-RateLimit-Limit

put.description: Update mutable fields on an existing location. Only fields included in the request body are changed.

get.description: Return all ancestor locations from the root of the hierarchy down to the immediate parent of the specified location.
Return the immediate child locations of the specified location (one level deep only).
Return all descendant locations (children, grandchildren, etc.) beneath the specified location in the hierarchy.

post.description:
Attach a tag identifier (RFID EPC, BLE beacon ID, barcode, etc.) to an existing location.
The identifier must be unique within the organization.
post.summary: Add an identifier to a location

delete.description: Detach a tag identifier from a location by its identifier record ID.
delete.summary: Remove an identifier from a location

get.description: Returns the organization scoped by the API key presented in Authorization. Intended as a lightweight health-check primitive for integrators verifying a key works end-to-end.
get.summary: Get the org associated with the authenticated API key
List active API keys for an organization

post.description: Mints an API-key JWT scoped to the target org. Accepts either session-admin or an API key with the keys:admin scope.
post.summary: Create a new API key for an organization
